fanStarters.prompt: Both had you sweating in public while a line formed behind you.

whichWasWorse.title: Locker Combination Panic vs Password Reset Loop
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: forgetting the combo with people watching or resetting a password for the fifth time?

whichWasWorse.title: Forgotten Gym Clothes vs Camera-On Meeting
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: borrowing mystery shorts or realizing your face is already on-screen?

whichWasWorse.title: Group Project Poster Board vs Shared Doc Chaos
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: one person buying glitter letters or five people typing over each other?

whichWasWorse.title: Agenda Book Signature vs Read Receipt
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: forging a parent initial or watching someone ignore proof of delivery?

whichWasWorse.title: Book Fair Budget vs Sephora Basket
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: choosing one pencil eraser or removing one lip oil to afford rent?

whichWasWorse.title: Calling Your Friend's House vs Sending the First Text
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: asking their dad if they were home or typing hey and regretting it instantly?

whichWasWorse.title: Period Leak Check vs White Pants Day
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: asking a friend to inspect the back or trusting white denim after lunch?

whichWasWorse.title: Bus Seat Saving vs Rideshare Small Talk
whichWasWorse.prompt: Which was worse: pretending a seat was taken or being trapped in weather conversation?
